content.problemStatement:
Chef has an array AAA such that Ai=iA_i = iAi‚Äã=i.

A transform on the array is performed by replacing each element of the array with the bitwise XOR of the prefix till that element. For example, if BBB denotes the array after performing transform on array AAA, then, Bi=A1‚äïA2‚äï‚Ä¶‚äïAiB_i = A_1 \oplus A_2 \oplus \ldots \oplus A_iBi‚Äã=A1‚Äã‚äïA2‚Äã‚äï‚Ä¶‚äïAi‚Äã. Similarly, if CCC denotes the array after performing two transforms on array AAA, then, Ci=B1‚äïB2‚äï‚Ä¶‚äïBiC_i = B_1 \oplus B_2 \oplus \ldots \oplus B_iCi‚Äã=B1‚Äã‚äïB2‚Äã‚äï‚Ä¶‚äïBi‚Äã.

Let fKf^KfK be the array obtained by performing KKK transforms on the array AAA. Thus, fXKf^K_XfXK‚Äã denotes the XthX^{th}Xth element of the KthK^{th}Kth transform of the array AAA.

Formally,


fi0=Aif^0_i = A_ifi0‚Äã=Ai‚Äã
fi1=A1‚äïA2‚äï‚Ä¶‚äïAif^1_i = A_1 \oplus A_2 \oplus \ldots \oplus A_ifi1‚Äã=A1‚Äã‚äïA2‚Äã‚äï‚Ä¶‚äïAi‚Äã
fi2=f11‚äïf21‚äï‚Ä¶‚äïfi1f^2_i = f^1_1 \oplus f^1_2 \oplus \ldots \oplus f^1_ifi2‚Äã=f11‚Äã‚äïf21‚Äã‚äï‚Ä¶‚äïfi1‚Äã
fik=f1k‚àí1‚äïf2k‚àí1‚äï‚Ä¶‚äïfik‚àí1f^k_i = f^{k-1}_1 \oplus f^{k-1}_2 \oplus \ldots \oplus f^{k-1}_ifik‚Äã=f1k‚àí1‚Äã‚äïf2k‚àí1‚Äã‚äï‚Ä¶‚äïfik‚àí1‚Äã. Here, ‚äï\oplus‚äï denotes the bitwise XOR operation.
Given KKK and XXX, determine the value fXKf^K_XfXK‚Äã.


Input Format

First line will contain TTT, number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
Each test case contains of a single line of input, two integers K,XK, XK,X as mentioned in the problem statement.


Output Format
For each test case, output in a single line, the value fXKf^K_XfXK‚Äã
